title: Sial Optimized Modpack
description: Blazing Fast Modpack that aims to have the best FPS boost at all costs, with some QOL mods that don't hurt performance as well. Benchmarks show this pack is faster then the rest while also keeping a good feature base including optifine features.
body:
Modpack that aims to have the best FPS at all costs, with some QOL mods that don't hurt performance as well.

This modpack also contains compatibility with optifine texturepacks.

Faster then all other packs

See here for benchmarks
Measured in FPS higher is better.
